# Usage Example:

**Query with Entity and Page Types:**
> Use blazor-page-generator skill to generate complete List, Create, Edit, and Detail pages for the Request entity with proper component library integration and Playwright UI tests.
**带实体和页面类型的提问：**
> 使用 blazor-page-generator skill，为 Request 实体生成完整的列表、创建、编辑和详情页面，包含正确的组件库集成和 Playwright UI 测试。
